EmptyDataBind.SQL:
SELECT TOP 20 ft.Ident ,STUFF( ( SELECT ' → ' + ftv.FolderName FROM ( SELECT TOP (LEN(ft.Ident) / 7) ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)) AS n FROM sys.objects ) x INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTreeView as ftv on ftv.Ident = LEFT(ft.Ident,(7*n))
FOR XML PATH('') ), 1, 3, '') AS Name FROM dbo.FolderTree as ft INNER JOIN dbo.Folder as f on f.ID = ft.FolderID AND f.[State] = @StateOne LEFT JOIN dbo.FolderTree as ftPar on ftPar.ID = ft.ParentFolderTreeID WHERE NOT EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM dbo.FolderTree WHERE Ident LIKE ft.Ident + '%' AND Ident != ft.Ident ) ORDER BY ft.Ident

DataBind.SQL:
SELECT ft.Ident ,STUFF( ( SELECT ' → ' + ftv.FolderName FROM ( SELECT TOP (LEN(ft.Ident) / 7) ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)) AS n FROM sys.objects ) x INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTreeView as ftv on ftv.Ident = LEFT(ft.Ident,(7*n))
FOR XML PATH('') ), 1, 3, '') AS Name FROM dbo.FolderTree as ft INNER JOIN dbo.Folder as f on f.ID = ft.FolderID AND f.[State] = @StateOne LEFT JOIN dbo.FolderTree as ftPar on ftPar.ID = ft.ParentFolderTreeID WHERE NOT EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM dbo.FolderTree WHERE Ident LIKE ft.Ident + '%' AND Ident != ft.Ident ) AND f.[Name] LIKE @BreakdownFolderTreeIdent ORDER BY ft.Ident

SelectedDataBind.SQL:
SELECT ft.Ident ,STUFF( ( SELECT ' → ' + ftv.FolderName FROM ( SELECT TOP (LEN(ft.Ident) / 7) ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)) AS n FROM sys.objects ) x INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTreeView as ftv on ftv.Ident = LEFT(ft.Ident,(7*n))
FOR XML PATH('') ), 1, 3, '') AS Name FROM dbo.FolderTree as ft INNER JOIN dbo.Folder as f on f.ID = ft.FolderID WHERE ft.[Ident] = @BreakdownFolderTreeIdent
